concept: Develop an adventure where you control an amnesiac deity whose godly powers only function when observed by their faithful followers. Moving between regions requires gathering believers who witness your miracles, but each community expects different divine behaviors based on their unique cultural beliefs. Performing contradictory miracles causes believers to question your divinity, weakening your observed powers and requiring careful reputation management. Ancient rival gods send agents to expose your inconsistencies while you piece together memories of the cosmic hierarchy you've fallen from. The climactic revelation shows that belief itself created all gods, and your amnesia was self-imposed to understand mortal perspective.
